title: [codereview] BLE transport: callback invocations outside lock without initialized check (connected/disconnected/security_changed)
description: The three BLE callbacks access transport_state.config.conn_cb and .user_ctx after mutex unlock (or without full lock in some paths). Deinit can set initialized=false concurrently leading to use-after-free or stale callback. The bug report exactly describes this race. Must snapshot cb/ctx under lock and check initialized. P0 race condition. Fix immediately. Tagged codereview. Related to project-LICHEN-om93.
